body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features cracked molten gold scales across the forehead, with dark blue chest lightning bolt replaced by a glowing ember-scaled chest plate. Striped patterns transform into magma-cracked texture along the limbs, while the curled tail tip becomes a flame-tipped extension with molten gold veins. Electric shock waves dissipate into heat-haze distortion around the body, and the four legs now bear ember-scaled armor plating on the joints.
signature_feature: Flame-tipped tail: molten gold veins with flickering crimson embers.
